title: The San Francisco Examiner - May 8, 1957 (Page 34)

card_summary: A newspaper clipping from The San Francisco Examiner (San Francisco, California), dated May 8, 1957, page 34. This clipping dates to an active period of Philip K. Dick's early publishing career while he was living in the Bay Area, and likely contains local coverage relevant to his life or work.
page_summary:
A scanned newspaper page from The San Francisco Examiner (San Francisco, California), dated Wednesday, May 8, 1957, page 34. The clipping was sourced from Newspapers.com and downloaded on April 9, 2025. The PDF text layer contains only source metadata with no recoverable article text.

The San Francisco Examiner was one of the major daily newspapers serving the Bay Area where Dick lived during the 1950s. May 1957 falls during Dick's productive period in the region, when he was writing prolifically for science fiction magazines and beginning to produce novels. The Examiner documented the cultural, social, and political life of the Bay Area that formed the backdrop to Dick's creative work. The specific content of this page remains to be determined through examination of the scanned image.
